title: Move creative-mode build handling into decomposer layer
description: HtnPlanner.CreateCreativeBuildActions was dead code - PlannerRouter prefers BuildGoalDecomposer, and HtnTaskLibrary.DecomposeBuild already handles creative mode internally. Removed the creative branch from HtnPlanner.PlanAsync and the CreateCreativeBuildActions helper method.

comments.author: SteveBot
comments.body: Completed in Sprint 50 Wave B. Removed dead CreateCreativeBuildActions from HtnPlanner. DecomposeBuild already handles creative mode. The HtnPlanner branch was dead code since PlannerRouter prefers BuildGoalDecomposer first.
